# Integration Boundary

## Uses
- M31 design system
- M32 shell
- M33 JobCard Detail UX links
- M35 moghare360-service-operation-ux.css
- M35 moghare360-service-operation-ux-data.php
- Existing auth (unchanged)

## Links To (unchanged prototypes)
- erp-service-operation-create.php (M20)
- erp-service-operation-detail.php (M20)
- erp-jobcard-detail-ux.php (M33)
- erp-jobcard-part-use.php (M24)
- erp-purchase-request-create.php (M26)
- erp-payment-create.php (M28)
- erp-qc-check.php (M30)

## Forbidden Changes
- config.php, staff-auth.php, access-control.php
- Legacy portal
- SQL schema
- M20 operational logic

## Final Boundary Decision
Additive UX pages only.
